title: Glasgow Prestwick Airport doubles weekly Air China Cargo flights

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Glasgow Prestwick Airport (PIK) has significantly increased its China operations.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Glasgow Prestwick Airport doubles weekly Air China Cargo flights Air China Cargo flight crew are welcomed on their maiden flight to Glasgow Prestwick Airport.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: Glasgow Prestwick Airport (PIK) has significantly increased its China operations as carrier Air China Cargo doubled its weekly freighter services from four to eight, and added Chengdu Shuangliu International Airport (CTU), China, to its existing Guangzhou (CAN) service. The additional four flights to CTU, using an A330 freighter, commenced 22nd November.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Glasgow Prestwick Airport doubles weekly Air China Cargo flights
